headline: Ulta Beauty’s Earnings Selloff Won’t Last. Our Bullish Thesis Remains Intact.
summary: Ulta Beauty  fiscal fourth quarter results are getting an ugly reaction on Wall Street, but there is a lot to like about the quarter—and the stock.  Shares of Ulta are down 19% since Barron’s recommended them less than a month ago, with more today’s selloff accounting for more than 10%.
